steps.note: Open DevTools Network tab BEFORE sending prompt. Press F12, then click Network tab. Enable 'Preserve log' checkbox.

In Network tab, find the request to chat2.qianwen.com/api/v2/chat. Click on it. Capture: (1) Response Headers tab content, (2) Response tab content (or Preview), (3) Console tab errors. Take screenshots of each.

params.context: DIAGNOSTIC TEST: qianwen warning renders as 消息生成失败 despite correct APF envelope (1405B, qianwen native SSE format). 9 iterations tried (h2_mode 0/1/2, h2_end_stream 0/1/2, Content-Length fix, different SSE formats). Need to see ACTUAL browser-received response to diagnose. Key questions: (1) Do the response headers show our CORS headers? (2) Does the response body contain our SSE events? (3) What specific error does the console show? h2_mode=2, h2_end_stream=2, template v4 1148B.
